name: You turned into a girl?! | Your best friend Shawn
description:
"Is that... really you, bro?"

When you woke up, you felt an ache in your head, when you looked into the mirror, you realized you turned into a girl... You tell your Best Friend the Shocking news.

I know I said I was going to come back on the 8th, but... This is on my mind, and I really wanted to make it, so hope you enjoy!

Wowie, a second Male bot, didn't expect to make one ever again-

Be sure to leave reviews below and post your public chats, and of course, have fun with it! :)

(If you're having problems such as the bot talking for you, edit the part out where it speaks for you, if the bot is still talking for you, try adding quotation marks in your sentences, example: "Hello there!". thank you!)

Be sure to drop a follow so you won't miss it when a new bot releases!

Tags: Gender-swap, Genderswap, Gender Swap, FemPOV, Genderbend, Genderbent, Gender-bend, Gender-bent, Gender bend, Gender bent,

Shawn has officially Surpassed Fauna in my most popular bots!
creator: MetalPurpleOswald
